# Config Reference

All configuration is defined in [`config/config_weekly.R`](../../config/config_weekly.R) and saved as a timestamped `.RData` file in `config/config_weekly_settings/`. The pipeline loads this snapshot at runtime via `read_latest("config/config_weekly_settings/")`.

Historical pipeline configuration lives in [`config/config_hx.R`](../../config/config_hx.R).

---

## config/config_weekly.R

### CLI Arguments (via `argparse`)

| Key | Type | Example | Controls |
|-----|------|---------|---------|
| `--input` | string | `"1_input/w37"` | Input directory containing `datasheet/`, `pcr/`, `platemap/`, `all_species/` |
| `--week` | integer | `37` | Epidemiological week number |
| `--year` | integer | `2025` | Calendar year |
| `--year_hx` | integer | `2017` | Start year for historical analysis window |
| `--cp_threshold` | numeric | `500` | Copy number threshold above which a pool is "positive" (copies/µL) |
| `--rn_threshold` | numeric | `34000` | Fluorescence (Rn) threshold for Ct calling in Quantstudio3 |
| `--vi_threshold` | numeric | `0.75` | Virus Index threshold for flagging high-risk zones in report |
| `--download` | logical | `TRUE` | Whether to download fresh data from Google Drive |
| `--update` | logical | `TRUE` | Whether to push new results back to Google Sheets database |
| `--push` | logical | `TRUE` | Whether to push final report to Google Drive output folder |

### Directory Paths (auto-derived from `--input`)

| Variable | Value (example) | Purpose |
|----------|-----------------|---------|
| `dir_input` | `"1_input/w37"` | Root input directory |
| `dir_datasheet` | `"1_input/w37/datasheet"` | Pool-level surveillance datasheets |
| `dir_pcr` | `"1_input/w37/pcr"` | Quantstudio3 PCR output files |
| `dir_platemap` | `"1_input/w37/platemap"` | Well-to-pool-ID mapping CSVs |
| `dir_all_spp` | `"1_input/w37/all_species"` | Trap-level species count files |
| `dir_mid` | `"2_mid"` | Intermediate checkpoint directory |
| `dir_output` | `"3_output"` | Final output directory |

### Google Sheet IDs (hardcoded)

| Variable | Sheet ID | Content |
|----------|----------|---------|
| `key_database_gsheet` | `12Mf-w9I9NHTTDjzEPRoxUE08ka4WZ6RE-RM1s-FW7qA` | Master WNV-S pool results database |
| `key_database_culex_sheet` | `15icsYx5SkmQIPXV3Vzj6PhyX81M55mIAYfKDj5K3gac` | Culex species database |
| `key_foco_trap` | `1G5UcRmcVsVpMtKW_-4WLKX8WT_fvyIYj7sGcoNxDmr4` | Fort Collins trap metadata (coordinates, status) |
| `key_standards_gsheet` | `1bSMYQ4bZ9uBfrOQ6ylsegNmmGYdf9YFVbxB4qBhnFQo` | qPCR standard curve reference data |

### Zone & Grouping Variables

| Variable | Type | Value | Purpose |
|----------|------|-------|---------|
| `zone_lvls` | character vector | `c("NW","NE","SE","SW","FC","LV","BE","BC")` | Ordered factor levels for all zones |
| `grp_zones` | character vector | `c("NE","SE","NW","SW","LV","BC","BE")` | Zones included in grouped statistics |
| `fc_zones` | character vector | `c("NE","SE","NW","SW")` | Fort Collins collection zones only |
| `grp_vars` | character vector | `c("year","week","zone","spp")` | Default grouping variables for calculations |
| `hx_grp_vars` | character vector | `c("week","zone")` | Grouping variables for historical comparisons |
| `spp_keep` | character vector | `c("Tarsalis","Pipiens")` | Culex species included in analysis |

### Column Selection

| Variable | Fields included | Purpose |
|----------|-----------------|---------|
| `col_database` | `csu_id, trap_id, zone, year, week, trap_date, method, spp, total, test_code, cq, copies, seq` | Columns retained in the master database |
| `col_datasheet` | above + `county, genus, sex, no_gravid, no_deplete, lat, long` | Full datasheet column set |

### Output File Naming

| Variable | Example value | Purpose |
|----------|---------------|---------|
| `file_prefix` | `"y2025_w37_"` | Prefix for all intermediate and output files |
| `fn_weekly_input_format` | `"3_output/weekly_data_input_format.csv"` | Formatted input CSV for QC |
| `fn_cq_out` | `"2_mid/y2025_w37_pcr_clean.RData"` | Cleaned PCR checkpoint |
| `fn_pcr_plot` | `"3_output/plots/y2025_w37_pcr_plot.png"` | PCR scatter plot output path |
| `fn_report` | `"y2025_w37_weekly_report_output"` | Excel report basename |

### Colour Palettes

| Variable | Value | Used for |
|----------|-------|---------|
| `pal_mozzy` | `list(Tarsalis="#e9724c", Pipiens="#820263")` | Species colours in current-week plots |
| `pal_mozzy_hx` | `list(current_Tarsalis="#e9724c", hx_Tarsalis="grey50", ...)` | Historical comparison plots (current = colour, historical = grey) |

---

## config/config_hx.R

Used by [`wnv-s_calc_hx.qmd`](../../wnv-s_calc_hx.qmd) only. Contains the same zone/species definitions plus a multi-year data path pointing at all historical input weeks. Not consumed by the main weekly pipeline.

---

## config/load_packages.R

Centralised `library()` calls for all packages used across the pipeline. Load order matters — `PooledInfRate` must be installed via `devtools::install_github` (not CRAN).

---

## Run Order

```bash
# Step 1 — generate config (required before pipeline)
bash config/run_config.sh --week 37 --year 2025 --download T --update T --push T

# Step 2 — render the pipeline
quarto render wnv-s_weekly_report_pipeline_v2.qmd
```
